reviews.text:
I cannot express how incredible working with Bryan is. He turns everything he touches into a cinematic masterpiece. The care and artistry with which he captured every moment of my wedding was inspiring.

Bryan’s communication throughout the whole process was excellent and he had a crazy fast turnaround time for deliverables. The man is dedicated to his craft. Naturally, nothing went as planned on my wedding day and Bryan was my buoy in the storm. His warm and calming presence was a comfort while he kept us on schedule and made sure we got all the photos on our list.

I’m so thankful to have found him, he is a wonderful person on top of being insanely talented.

I highly recommend working with Bryan especially if you’re looking for a ski wedding/engagement photographer/videographer. We had so much and we’re in love with our photos and video. Bryan was very professional, friendly and made sure we got everything we wanted out of our session

One of the best videographer and photographer we’ve had. :)
Our video and short film turned out so beautiful it has touched ours and our guests hearts with tears of joy. The pictures are beautiful.
It’s really a good sign when you see and can tell that your photographer really loves their work and that is shown in the results.
Also, we can’t help but forget how our hearts were touched by the kindness Bryan showed to us by helping us find a place where we could have our micro wedding.
It’s a place we will treasure forever :)
His kindness and amazing work really won us over and we were absolutely thrilled to have him at our wedding.
Tim and Jesse

Bryan delivered to us the most beautiful, meaningful, and creative video of our wedding day.  It is a breathtaking video we will cherish forever and ever and show our children. Bryan is not only a friend of ours but a kind, fun loving, adventurous, generous and talented person. He was an absolute joy to have around on our wedding day as we got ready for our ceremony and beyond. He made us both feel comfortable in front of the camera. We cannot thank Bright Birch films enough for capturing our day in a way that will freeze that day forever for us ♥️

Hiring Bright Birch Films was the best decision we could have made for our big day. We just received our video and we love it sooo much; our entire town is going nuts over it! It’s a true work of art.

Bryan captured our day in a way that I didn’t think was possible. He is an extremely gifted artist. He also is a great person to have around, he makes you feel so comfortable. My husband has always been camera shy and I was so worried that he would stiffen up in front of the camera but Bryan is so friendly and easy-going that it’s almost impossible not to be yourself around him.

From beginning to end, working with Bright Birch Films has been a dream. Bryan is a great communicator, he kept us updated with his editing schedule and even delivered our videos earlier than expected. And the videos are just breathtaking.

I would recommend Bright Birch Films over and over again. The videos he made for us will be treasured forever ♥️
